response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates 15+ years of software engineering experience and proven ability to learn across diverse tech stacks, this role has three critical hard requirements that are not met: native-level Japanese language proficiency (explicitly required), strong C/UNIX systems programming expertise (job core), and embedded systems security knowledge (primary domain). The resume shows web/high-level language dominance (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, D) rather than systems-level C development or embedded firmware work. Without Japanese fluency alone, the candidate cannot function in the role.
strengths: Extensive 15+ years of software development across multiple domains demonstrates ability to adapt and learn quickly
Proven open-source contributor and mentor (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) showing deep technical capability and communication skills
Full-stack competency and experience with complex systems (microservices, real-time processing, distributed platforms)
concerns: No native-level Japanese language proficiency listed; resume shows only English, Romanian, and basic German—an explicit hard requirement for this role
No embedded systems, firmware development, or network security experience demonstrated; background is primarily web and high-level application development
Minimal C/UNIX systems programming expertise shown; career emphasizes JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and D language rather than C systems development

key_factors.factor: No embedded security or firmware expertise
